title: How was the drunk removed from the ring?

meanings.usage: 指在西班牙等国家流行的传统竞技活动，公牛与斗牛士之间的较量
指喝醉酒的人，相当于drunk person
指漫无目的地走动或走失，常与into/around连用
指在斗牛中负责刺杀公牛的专业人员
用于表示从表面看或根据情况判断，常修饰形容词或整个句子
指对某事物敏感或容易感受，常与to连用表示对什么敏感
作动词时常表示向某人或某物冲过去，用at连接对象
是形容词clumsy的副词形式，描述动作不灵巧
表示尊敬或致意的动作，常与to连用表示向谁鞠躬
指用力将某物或某人拖向某处，强调费力
是sympathetic的副词形式，表示以同情的态度
指聚集在一起的一群人，也可作动词表示挤满
指可能发生的危险或伤害，常与in/out of连用
指所说的话或发表的评论，可数名词
指心理上的关注，turn attention to表示将注意力转向

phrases.usage: 漫步进入；不知不觉走进

examples.en: The drunk suddenly wandered into the middle of the ring.
examples.zh: 那个醉汉突然漫步走进了场地中央。

examples.en: The drunk was unaware of the danger.
The bull suddenly caught sight of the drunk.
examples.zh: 公牛突然看见了那个醉汉。

examples.en: The drunk was waving a red cap.
examples.zh: 醉汉正在挥动一顶红色的帽子。
观众突然爆发出欢呼声。

examples.en: He clumsily stepped aside to let it pass.
examples.zh: 他笨拙地闪到一边让牛过去。

examples.en: They quickly dragged the drunk to safety.
examples.zh: 他们迅速把醉汉拖到安全的地方。

examples.en: The bull turned its attention to the matador.
examples.zh: 公牛把注意力转向了斗牛士。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某个时刻正在进行的动作，由was/were + 动词-ing构成
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing + 时间/动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的动作，或作为另一动作的背景

examples.en: The bull was busy with the matador at the time.
examples.zh: 当时公牛正忙着对付斗牛士。

examples.en: The drunk was shouting rude remarks and waving a red cap.
examples.zh: 醉汉正大声说着粗鲁的话并挥动着一顶红帽子。

grammar.title: 连词but与however表示转折
grammar.definition: but是并列连词，连接两个并列成分；however是副词，需用逗号隔开
grammar.structure: 句子1 + but + 句子2 / 句子1, however, + 句子2
grammar.usage: 用于连接两个意思相反或相对立的分句，表示转折关系

examples.en: The crowd began to shout, but the drunk was unaware of the danger.
examples.zh: 观众开始叫喊，但醉汉没有意识到危险。

examples.en: The crowd suddenly grew quiet. The drunk, however, seemed quite sure of himself.
examples.zh: 观众突然安静下来。然而醉汉却似乎很有把握。

grammar.title: When引导的时间状语从句
grammar.definition: when引导的时间状语从句，主句和从句的动作可能同时发生或先后发生
grammar.structure: When + 从句, 主句 / 主句 + when + 从句
grammar.usage: 用于表示某个动作发生的时间，主句用过去时态时，从句也常用过去时

examples.en: When the bull got close to him, he clumsily stepped aside.
examples.zh: 当公牛靠近他时，他笨拙地闪到一边。

examples.en: The drunk bowed when the crowd broke into cheers.
examples.zh: 当观众爆发出欢呼声时，醉汉鞠了一躬。

sentencePatterns.pattern: When + 主语 + 过去时, 主语 + 过去时

original.en: When the bull got close to him, he clumsily stepped aside to let it pass.
original.zh: 当公牛靠近他时，他笨拙地闪到一边让它过去。

imitations.en: When the teacher came in, the students stood up.
imitations.zh: 当老师进来时，学生们站了起来。

imitations.en: When it started to rain, we ran into the house.
imitations.zh: 当下雨时，我们跑进了房子。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be busy with + 名词

original.en: The bull was busy with the matador at the time.
original.zh: 当时公牛正忙着对付斗牛士。

imitations.en: She was busy with her homework.
They were busy with the preparation for the party.
imitations.zh: 他们正忙着为聚会做准备。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + forget all about + 名词/代词 + and + 动词

original.en: The bull forgot all about the matador and charged at the drunk.
original.zh: 公牛完全忘记了斗牛士，向醉汉冲去。

imitations.en: He forgot all about his homework and went out to play.
imitations.zh: 他完全忘记了作业，出去玩儿了。

imitations.en: She forgot all about the meeting and left the office early.
imitations.zh: 她完全忘记了会议，早早地离开了办公室。

original.en: The drunk, however, seemed quite sure of himself.
original.zh: 然而醉汉似乎很有把握。

imitations.en: He seemed very tired after the long walk.
imitations.zh: 走了很长一段路后他似乎很累了。

imitations.en: The weather seemed quite nice this morning.
imitations.zh: 今天早上天气似乎很好。
